definition: for straight pattern valves, distance between the two planes perpendicular to the valve axis located at the extremities of the body end ports or for angle pattern valves distance between the plane located at the extremity of either body end port and perpendicular to, its axis and the axis of the other body end port

definition_ml.en: for straight pattern valves, distance between the two planes perpendicular to the valve axis located at the extremities of the body end ports or for angle pattern valves distance between the plane located at the extremity of either body end port and perpendicular to, its axis and the axis of the other body end port
definition_ml.de: bei einer Durchgangsamatur Abstand zwischen den beiden zur Mittellinie der Armatur senkrechten, äußeren Ebenen der Gehäuseendöffnungen bzw. bei einer Eckarmaturen Abstand zwischen der zur Mittellinie senkrechten, äußeren Ebene an einer Gehäuseendöffnung und der Mittellinie der anderen Gehäuseendöffnung
